category_sources: Official Net-SNMP site and repository describe SNMP applications, library, tools, and daemon.
source_facts.description says it implements SNMP v1, v2c, and v3 over IPv4 and IPv6.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub repository use Net-SNMP.
docs_sources: Official Net-SNMP developer/API documentation points users to the tutorial and modules/examples.
Official Net-SNMP documentation page lists README and protocol documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository net-snmp/net-snmp describes itself as a SNMP application library, tools and daemon.
source_facts.repo was empty, so official repository was determined from the Net-SNMP official source-control project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions SNMP versions and IPv4/IPv6.
source_facts.executables lists snmpd, snmpwalk, snmpget, snmptrapd, and related SNMP tools.
